scripts.dev:renderer: cross-env VITE_VERXIO_API_ENABLED=true VITE_VERXIO_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 npm run dev --prefix ../verxio-web
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5180 && cross-env VERXIO_DESKTOP_DEV_SERVER=http://127.0.0.1:5180 VITE_VERXIO_API_ENABLED=true VITE_VERXIO_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 VERXIO_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 node scripts/run-electron.cjs .
scripts.start: cross-env VERXIO_DESKTOP_WEB_DIST=../verxio-web/dist VITE_VERXIO_API_ENABLED=true VITE_VERXIO_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 VERXIO_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8787 node scripts/run-electron.cjs .
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix ../verxio-web && node scripts/sync-renderer.cjs && node scripts/assert-web-dist.cjs
scripts.ci: npm run format:check && npm run build
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run builder
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run builder -- --linux AppImage deb rpm
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run builder -- --mac dmg zip
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run builder -- --win nsis msi
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run builder -- --dir

extendInfo.NSAudioCaptureUsageDescription: Verxio uses system audio capture for bot-free meeting notes.
extendInfo.NSDesktopFolderUsageDescription: Verxio reads folders you choose for local agent context.
extendInfo.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: Verxio reads documents you choose for local agent context.
extendInfo.NSDownloadsFolderUsageDescription: Verxio saves exported artifacts and images to Downloads when requested.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Verxio uses the microphone for voice input and meeting transcription.
